name: skills-of-luca
description: Reusable agent skills by Luca Silverentand.

plugins.name: apple
plugins.description: Apple platform guidance for Human Interface Guidelines, platform conventions, and Apple framework or service integrations.

plugins.name: codebase
plugins.description: Codebase design and structure skills for API interfaces, repository organization, runtime boundaries, ownership, and cleanup of LLM-generated layouts.

plugins.name: deploy
plugins.description: Deployment skills for environment topology, infrastructure readiness, CI/CD automation, release pipelines, rollback, and post-deploy verification.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Visual and product design skills for websites, dashboards, design systems, and interactive UI direction.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation skills for repository docs, project context, document templates, design documents, and architecture decision records.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Planning skills for requirements, task specs, project intent interviews, Linear project setup, issue authoring, complexity estimation, work pickup, and project tidy-up.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Execution and reasoning workflows for system design, issue-to-PR delivery, root-cause analysis, repository management, decision trees, skill authoring, publishing, and retrospective improvement.
